div.p: • Growth: Backward toward index 0 • Schema: [int32: length][char[]: data][null: 1] • Return: Relative offset from buffer tail • Invariant: Must precede referencing tables
• Alignment: Pad to sizeof(Element) • Structure: [int32: count][T[]: elements] • Pointers: Elements stored as UOffsets • Action: Update write_pos by count * sizeof(T)
• Inline: Scalars stored by value (little-endian) • Indirection: Offsets used for Strings/Vectors • Tracking: Bit-set for field presence • VTable: Field metadata mapping
• VTable: Deduplicate and write header • SOffset: [int32: vtable_offset] @ table_start • Root: Write final UOffset to index 0 • Buffer: Finalize total length L

g.title: Buffer Complete: Ready for network transport

div.p: Higher Addresses (Tail) ──────────────────────────────────┐ [PADDING / ALIGNMENT BYTES] │ [STRING DATA: "AAPL"] <────────── write_pos (0x...F) │ [VECTOR DATA: f64[64]] │ [VTABLE 1: Metadata Fields] <──── deduplicated │ [TABLE DATA: Offsets] <────────── table_start │ [ROOT UOFFSET] │ Lower Addresses (Head) 0x00 ──────────────────────────────┘

p.em: Serialization occurs from Tail to Head (backward growth)

div.p: Validation Invariant: All String and Vector offsets must be written before the table that refers to them to maintain single-pass DAG serialization. Circular references are physically impossible.

g.title: Buffer Complete: Ready for network transport
